sandbox_invariants: every sandbox declares its inputs, outputs, and isolation guarantees
no sandbox writes to a higher-trust environment
no sandbox shares mutable state with another sandbox
every sandbox emits an append-only execution log
every sandbox is reproducible: same inputs → same outputs

sandbox_patterns.purpose: execute retrieval + assembly + escalation under bounded scope; no outbound writes
any runtime that fails a safety predicate is demoted to a quarantine sandbox; emission is suspended
slices on escalation hold are isolated from new emissions until escalation-supervisor decision
reviewer actions execute in a sandbox that cannot reach production write paths
provenance records are mounted read-only into every sandbox; mutation paths require governance pipeline auth
replay sandbox executes against frozen orchestration-trace input; outputs go to a side channel, never to production
